subcodes.first_line: O Isma'il! This Wronged One raiseth His call and lamenteth over Himself in these days when all the people of the Bayán [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمعیل اینمظلوم ندا مینماید و بر خود نوحه میکند در ایامیکه جمیع اهل بیان
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @rejection, opposition and persecution
